name: age2de
game: Age Of Empires II: Definitive Edition

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: scenarioBranching
options.description:
What checks are added to the pool for branching scenario decisions.
Any: Each branching objective will contain a single check.
All: Every branching objective contains a check.

options.name: enabled_campaigns
options.description: Determines which vanilla campaigns will be unlocked for the player.

options.name: starting_campaigns
options.description: Determines which vanilla campaigns will start unlocked for the player.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Goal for this playthrough.
Win Selected Campaigns: Finish each campaign selected for victory.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Attila, The Scourge of God: Bleda's Camp
Attila, The Scourge of God: Attila's Camp
Attila, The Walls of Constantinople: Red Gold
Attila, The Walls of Constantinople: Green Gold

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Attila, The Scourge of God: Bleda's Camp
Attila, The Scourge of God: Attila's Camp
Attila, The Walls of Constantinople: Red Gold
Attila, The Walls of Constantinople: Green Gold

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: startInventoryPool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
options: Attila, The Scourge of God: Bleda's Camp
Attila, The Scourge of God: Attila's Camp
Attila, The Walls of Constantinople: Red Gold
Attila, The Walls of Constantinople: Green Gold
